Rules of Court Order No. 5 of 2017
DIFC Courts Rules of Court Order No. 5 of 2017 Supplementing Part 44 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts
DIFC Courts Rules of Court Order No. 5 of 2017 Supplementing Part 44 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts 2017

Article 1.heading: This Order may be cited as the Rules of Court Order No. 5 of 2017

Article 2.heading: The Rules of the DIFC Courts (RDC) Part 44 on Appeals shall hereafter be referred to as the “Former Part 44” of the RDC. Schedule 1 to this Order shall supplement the Former Part 44 and shall hereafter be referred to as the “Amended Part 44” of the RDC

Article 3.heading: The Amended Part 44 shall come into force on 25 May 2017 and shall apply to appeals fi led against judgments or orders issued on or after 25 May 2017. These Rules should be referred to as the “Amended Part 44” of the RDC or “ARDC44.xx” for particular rule references

Article 4.heading: Any appeals fi led against judgments or orders issued before 25 May 2017 shall be subject to the Former Part 44. These Rules should be referred to as the “Former Part $4 4 ^ { \mathrm { { \mathfrak { n } } } }$ of the RDC or “FRDC44.xx” for particular rule references

Article 5.heading: Effective 1 July 2017, any appeals fi led, regardless of when the judgment or order was issued, will be subject to the Amended Part 44

Article 6.heading: Any references in the rest of the RDC to Part 44 shall be amended to refer to both the Previous Part 44 and the Amended Part 44, where appropriate

Article 7.heading: The online version of the RDC shall include both the Previous Part 44 and the Amended Part 44, as will any future publications of the RDC, until further Order
